title.zh: 技术布道与内容影响力

zh: 输出高质量技术内容：博客文章、教程视频、案例拆解、最佳实践等
设计并制作可复用 Demo / 示例项目，降低开发者上手门槛
参加技术大会/Meetup/线上直播，主题演讲与产品展示
en: Produce high-quality technical content: blog posts, tutorial videos, case studies, best practices
Design reusable demos and sample projects to lower developer onboarding barriers
Participate in tech conferences, meetups, and livestreams for speaking and product demos

evidence.label: AI Demo 经验 @ 菲玲科技

title.zh: 开发者社区运营与生态建设

zh: 深度参与全球开发者社区，答疑、引导与促活
识别并运营 KOL/核心开发者，建立贡献者梯队与激励机制
策划组织黑客松、挑战赛、工作坊、Office Hours
en: Deeply engage global developer communities: Q&A, guidance, activation
Identify and manage KOLs/core contributors with tiered incentives
Plan and organize hackathons, challenges, workshops, and office hours

zh: 对接头部大模型/云厂商/开发平台，推进合作谈判、联合方案与技术集成落地
将外部资源转化为产品战斗力与增长抓手
推动合作项目从 PoC 到上线交付
en: Engage top AI/cloud/platform vendors for partnership negotiations and joint solutions
Convert external resources into product capabilities and growth drivers
Drive partner projects from PoC through to production delivery

zh: 建立社区反馈机制：收集需求、吐槽、失败案例与典型场景
协作推动优化：体验、文档、SDK、工具链与稳定性
跟踪关键指标与迭代效果，持续把产品推到 Next Level
en: Establish community feedback mechanisms for requirements, complaints, failure cases
Collaborate to improve UX, docs, SDK, toolchain, and stability
Track key metrics and iteration outcomes to continuously level up the product

evidence.label: 反馈闭环经验 @ 菲玲科技
